name_en: 💰 CHANEL Classic Flap Card Holder [Color] This card holder features a unique accordion design [Heart], allowing you to easily see every card without having to dig it out. The card holder has a total of six card slots, four of which can hold many cards 😘😘😘 It looks so good. Model A, Size 10.4×7×2cm, Color as shown
